name: vibeforge

skills.notes: Project-specific skills for AI agents running inside Vibeforge. These are in addition to core AGENT.md rules. When a task matches a skill, agents must read and follow it.

notes: This config tells Vibeforge app (when built) how to treat this project. The AGENT.md is the primary instruction file for all agents. Skills in .vibeforge/skills/ provide additional domain-specific guidance (UI polish, security, Rust, MCP, etc.).
